title: Pressure-Legible Observation (PLO-1.0)
description: PLO-E output. Pre-2A. Pre-critic. Pre-canonical. No enum fields. No canonical ID. No time fields. Contract authority: PLO-E v2 PDF §V, §VIII; PRESSURE-LEGIBLE-OBSERVATION-EXPANSION-AGENT.md v2.0 §V.

sourceSeedId.description: ID of the originating Atomic Unit. Passed through from PLO-E input. Not a canonical ID.

sourceSeedText.description: Text of the originating Atomic Unit. The neutral structural descriptor.

schemaVersion.description: PLO schema version — pinned. Must equal PLO-1.0.

observations.description: Domain-specific observations. 4–10 items. All domains must be distinct. Domain membership and uniqueness enforced in plo_validator.py (not expressible in JSON Schema draft-07).

domain.description: Perceptual domain label. Must be a member of VALID_DOMAINS in plo_schema.py.

observation.description: Neutral declarative observation string. No causality. No inference. No tension naming.
